entry.title: IDC W91CRB14D0011 (P00013) awarded to DRS RSTA, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00013 ADDS A SUBCLIN FOR REQUEST FOR EQUITABLE ADJUSTMENT (REA) FUNDING. FUNDING WILL BE PROVIDED VIA DELIVERY ORDER (DO) 0001, BUT WITH TWO (2) PRS/ LINES OF ACCOUNTING. CANNOT ADD TWO LOAS TO A SINGLE SUBCLIN, SO MOD P00013 ADDS ANOTHER (SEE SUMMARY OF CHANGES)

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: NIGHT VISION EQUIPMENT, EMITTED AND REFLECTED RADIATION

entry.title: IDC W91CRB14D0011 (P00014) awarded to DRS RSTA, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MOD P00014 REMOVES THE PBP SCHEDULE AND REPLACES PBP CLINS/SUBCLINS WITH TASKS/ DELIVERABLES (VARIOUS CLINS, SEE SUMMARY OF CHANGES, BLOCK 14 CONTINUATION PAGE THEREIN)

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: NIGHT VISION EQUIPMENT, EMITTED AND REFLECTED RADIATION
